name: pwg-nominal-grammar
title: PWG nominal grammar layer — inflection index, reverse paradigm dictionary, and compound segmentation
description: Structured grammatical data for the Petersburg Dictionary (PWG, Böhtlingk–Roth) Sanskrit headwords: a compact Zaliznyak-style inflection index per headword, the reverse paradigm dictionary (index token → headwords), and the MW <k2> compound segmentation lookup. Generated by src/reverse_index.py + src/nominal_grammar.py + src/mw_compounds.py from the read-only Cologne sources. This is a STRUCTURED-DATA asset (declension display, reverse indexing, FAIR export) and is deliberately NOT used in the DE→RU translation pipeline — an A/B test (NOMINAL_GRAMMAR_AB.md) showed grammar-in-the-prompt does not improve translation and sometimes mildly hurts it. See ZALIZNYAK_INDEX.md and GRAMMAR_LAYER.md.

sources.title: Petersburger Wörterbuch (PWG), Böhtlingk–Roth — headwords, <lex> gender, <k2> accent
WhitneyRoots crosswalk + grammar_refs.json (root layer), CC BY-SA

resources.name: headword-index
resources.title: Per-word structured grammar (98,639 PWG nominal headwords)

fields.name: accented
fields.title: Accented citation form (PWG <k2>); '/' marks the udātta vowel

fields.name: index_token
fields.title: Zaliznyak-style inflection index G·T S F (e.g. m·8n*); see ZALIZNYAK_INDEX.md

fields.name: compound_members
fields.title: MW <k2> em-dash member split, '+'-joined; empty if not a compound

fields.name: count
fields.title: Number of headwords with this index

resources.name: reverse-paradigm-index
resources.title: Reverse dictionary: index token → sorted list of headword#hom keys
resources.description: JSON object {index_token: [headword#hom, …]}. The inverse of headword-index; Zaliznyak's reverse-dictionary principle over the whole PWG.

resources.name: mw-compounds
resources.title: MW <k2> compound segmentation lookup (106,603 entries)
resources.description: JSON object {k1_slp1: [member1, member2, …]} from MW em-dash <k2> boundaries (Funderburk); Vedic accent marks stripped from members.

resources.name: whitney-root-grammar
resources.title: Verb-root grammar (Whitney class/PPP/§§/exceptions), SLP1-keyed
resources.description: JSON {root_slp1: [record, …]} materialized from the WhitneyRoots crosswalk + grammar_refs.json; the root-layer companion to the nominal layer.
